member.name: T:MauiControls.Collections.ObservableRangeCollection`1
member.summary: Represents a dynamic data collection that provides notifications when items get added, removed, or when the whole list is refreshed.
member.typeparam: The object type of elements in the collection.

member.name: M:MauiControls.Collections.ObservableRangeCollection`1.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:MauiControls.Collections.ObservableRangeCollection`1.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`0})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class that contains elements copied from the specified collection.
member.param: collection: The collection from which the elements are copied.
member.exception: The collection parameter cannot be null.

member.name: M:MauiControls.Collections.ObservableRangeCollection`1.AddRange(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`0},System.Collections.Specialized.NotifyCollectionChangedAction)
member.summary: Adds the elements of the specified collection to the end of the ObservableCollection(Of T).
member.exception: An exception when an invalid notification mode is set.

member.name: M:MauiControls.Collections.ObservableRangeCollection`1.RemoveRange(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`0},System.Collections.Specialized.NotifyCollectionChangedAction)
member.summary: Removes the first occurrence of each item in the specified collection from ObservableCollection(Of T). NOTE: with notificationMode = Remove, removed items starting index is not set because items are not guaranteed to be consecutive.
member.exception: An exception when an invalid notification mode is set.

member.name: M:MauiControls.Collections.ObservableRangeCollection`1.Replace(`0)
member.summary: Clears the current collection and replaces it with the specified item.
member.param: The item to replace the collection with.

member.name: M:MauiControls.Collections.ObservableRangeCollection`1.ReplaceRange(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`0})
member.summary: Clears the current collection and replaces it with the specified collection.

member.name: T:MauiControls.Collections.PaletteCollection
member.summary: Creates PaletteCollection for row's visual. It repeats colors consecutively for rows.

member.name: M:MauiControls.Collections.PaletteCollection.GetColor(System.Int32,System.Object)
member.summary: Determines the for the row.
member.param: Index of the row based on DataSource.

member.name: T:MauiControls.Converters.SortDataTypeConverter
member.summary: Converts string to .

member.name: E:MauiControls.DataGrid.ItemSelected
member.summary: Occurs when an item is selected in the DataGrid.

member.name: E:MauiControls.DataGrid.Refreshing
member.summary: Occurs when the DataGrid is being refreshed.

member.summary: Occurs when the of the DataGrid is changed.

member.name: E:MauiControls.DataGrid.RowsTextColorPaletteChanged
member.summary: Occurs when the of the DataGrid is changed.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGrid.DefaultHeaderLabelStyle
member.summary: Default style for the header label

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGrid.DefaultHeaderFilterStyle
member.summary: Default style for the header filter entry

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGrid.DefaultSortIconStyle
member.summary: Default style for the sort icon

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGrid.DefaultPaginationStepperStyle
member.summary: Default style for the data grid paging control

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGrid.ActiveRowColor
member.summary: Gets or sets selected Row color.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGrid.HeaderBackground
member.summary: Gets or sets the background color of the column header Default value is .

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGrid.FooterBackground
member.summary: Gets or sets backgroundColor of the footer that contains pagination elements Default value is .

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGrid.FooterTextColor
member.summary: Gets or sets textColor of the footer that contains pagination elements Default value is .

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGrid.BorderColor
member.summary: Gets or sets border color Default Value is .

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGrid.ItemSizingStrategy
member.summary: Gets or sets Default Value is .

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGrid.RowToEdit
member.summary: Gets or sets the row to set to edit mode.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGrid.RowsBackgroundColorPalette
member.summary: Gets or sets background color of the rows. It repeats colors consecutively for rows.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGrid.RowsTextColorPalette
member.summary: Gets or sets text color of the rows. It repeats colors consecutively for rows.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGrid.RowTappedCommand
member.summary: Gets or sets executes the command when a row is tapped. Works with selection disabled.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGrid.ItemsSource
member.summary: Gets or sets ItemsSource of the DataGrid.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGrid.Columns
member.summary: Gets or sets columns of the DataGrid.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGrid.FontSize
member.summary: Gets or sets font size of the cells. It does not sets header font size. Use to set header font size.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGrid.FontFamily
member.summary: Gets or sets the font family. It does not sets header font family. Use to set header font size.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGrid.PageSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the page size.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGrid.PageSizeList
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of available page sizes.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGrid.PageSizeVisible
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the page size picker is visible.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGrid.PaginationStepperStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets the pagination stepper style.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGrid.RowHeight
member.summary: Gets or sets the row height.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGrid.FooterHeight
member.summary: Gets or sets footer height.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGrid.HeaderHeight
member.summary: Gets or sets header height.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGrid.IsSortable
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether sorting is enabled. Obsolete. Use instead.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGrid.SortingEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether gets or sets if the grid allows sorting. Default value is true. Sortable columns must implement If you want to enable or disable sorting for specific column please use property.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGrid.FilteringEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether gets or sets if the grid allows filtering. Default value is false. If you want to enable or disable filtering for specific column please use property.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGrid.PageNumber
member.summary: Gets or sets the page number. Default value is 1.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGrid.PaginationEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether pagination is enabled in the DataGrid. Default value is False.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGrid.SelectionEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether sets whether selection is enabled for the DataGrid. Default value is true.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGrid.SelectionMode
member.summary: Gets or sets set the SelectionMode for the DataGrid. Default value is Single.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGrid.SelectedItem
member.summary: Gets or sets the selected item.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGrid.SelectedItems
member.summary: Gets or sets the selected items.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGrid.PullToRefreshCommand
member.summary: Gets or sets the command to execute when refreshing via a pull gesture.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGrid.PullToRefreshCommandParameter
member.summary: Gets or sets the parameter to pass to the .

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGrid.RefreshColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the spinner color to use while refreshing.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGrid.IsRefreshing
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to display an ActivityIndicator.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGrid.RefreshingEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether refreshing the DataGrid by a pull down command is enabled.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGrid.BorderThickness
member.summary: Gets or sets border thickness for cells.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGrid.HeaderBordersVisible
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to show the borders of header cells. Default value is true.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGrid.SortedColumnIndex
member.summary: Gets or sets column index and sorting order for the DataGrid.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGrid.HeaderLabelStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets style of the header label. Style's must be Label.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGrid.HeaderFilterStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets style of the header label. Style's must be Label.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGrid.SortIcon
member.summary: Gets or sets sort icon.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGrid.SortIconStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets style of the sort icon Style's must be Polygon.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGrid.NoDataView
member.summary: Gets or sets view to show when there is no data to display.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGrid.PageCount
member.summary: Gets the page count.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGrid.PageText
member.summary: Gets or sets the customized text for the 'Page' label in the pagination section.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGrid.PerPageText
member.summary: Gets or sets the customized text for the 'Per Page' label in the pagination section.

member.summary: Gets or sets the color of the active row.

member.summary: Gets or sets the background color of the header.

member.summary: Gets or sets the Row Tapped Command.

member.summary: Gets or sets the text for the page label in the DataGrid.

member.summary: Gets or sets the localized text for the per page label.

member.summary: Gets or sets the page count for the DataGrid.

member.summary: Gets or sets the page size for the DataGrid.

member.summary: Gets or sets the font family for the DataGrid.

member.summary: Gets or sets the selected items in the DataGrid.

member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether selection is enabled in the DataGrid. Default value is true.

member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether selection is enabled in the DataGrid.

member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether refreshing is enabled in the DataGrid.

member.summary: Gets or sets the parameter to pass to the .

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Scrolls to the row.
member.param: Position of the row in screen.

member.name: M:MauiControls.DataGrid.UpdatePageSizeList
member.summary: Checks if PageSizeList contains the new PageSize value, so that it shows in the dropdown.

member.name: T:MauiControls.DataGridColumn
member.summary: Specifies each column of the DataGrid.
member.remarks: Had to add a SuppressionMessage of Android API 21 (Android 5.0) warning. Minimum Android version is 14.0 (API 34).

member.name: F:MauiControls.DataGridColumn.WidthProperty
member.summary: Gets or sets the width of the column.

member.name: F:MauiControls.DataGridColumn.TitleProperty
member.summary: Gets or sets the title of the column.

member.name: F:MauiControls.DataGridColumn.FilterTextProperty
member.summary: Gets or sets the filter text of the column.

member.name: F:MauiControls.DataGridColumn.FormattedTitleProperty
member.summary: Gets or sets the formatted title of the column.

member.name: F:MauiControls.DataGridColumn.PropertyNameProperty
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the property associated with the column.

member.name: F:MauiControls.DataGridColumn.IsVisibleProperty
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the column is visible.

member.name: F:MauiControls.DataGridColumn.StringFormatProperty
member.summary: Gets or sets the string format for the column.

member.name: F:MauiControls.DataGridColumn.CellTemplateProperty
member.summary: Gets or sets the cell template for the column.

member.name: F:MauiControls.DataGridColumn.EditCellTemplateProperty
member.summary: Gets or sets the cell template for editing the column.

member.name: F:MauiControls.DataGridColumn.LineBreakModeProperty
member.summary: Gets or sets the line break mode for the column.

member.name: F:MauiControls.DataGridColumn.HorizontalContentAlignmentProperty
member.summary: Gets or sets the horizontal content alignment for the column.

member.name: F:MauiControls.DataGridColumn.VerticalContentAlignmentProperty
member.summary: Gets or sets the vertical content alignment for the column.

member.name: F:MauiControls.DataGridColumn.PaddingProperty
member.summary: Gets or sets the distance between an element and its child elements.

member.name: F:MauiControls.DataGridColumn.SortingEnabledProperty
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether sorting is enabled for the column.

member.name: F:MauiControls.DataGridColumn.FilteringEnabledProperty
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether filtering is enabled for the column.

member.name: F:MauiControls.DataGridColumn.HeaderLabelStyleProperty
member.summary: Gets or sets the style for the header label of the column.

member.name: F:MauiControls.DataGridColumn.HeaderFilterStyleProperty
member.summary: Gets or sets the style for the header filter of the column.

member.name: M:MauiControls.DataGridColumn.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: E:MauiControls.DataGridColumn.SizeChanged
member.summary: Occurs when the size of the column changes.

member.name: E:MauiControls.DataGridColumn.VisibilityChanged
member.summary: Occurs when the visibility of the column changes.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGridColumn.Width
member.summary: Gets or sets width of the column. Like Grid, you can use , , or . Be careful when using Auto. Columns may become misaligned.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGridColumn.Title
member.summary: Gets or sets column title.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGridColumn.FormattedTitle
member.summary:
Gets or sets formatted title for column.
<DataGridColumn.FormattedTitle> <FormattedString> <Span Text="Home" TextColor="Black" FontSize="13" FontAttributes="Bold" /> <Span Text=" (won-lost)" TextColor="#333333" FontSize="11" /> </FormattedString> </DataGridColumn.FormattedTitle>

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGridColumn.FilterText
member.summary: Gets or sets text displayed in the Filter entry.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGridColumn.PropertyName
member.summary: Gets or sets property name to bind in the object.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGridColumn.IsVisible
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether this column visible.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGridColumn.StringFormat
member.summary: Gets or sets string format for the cell.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGridColumn.CellTemplate
member.summary: Gets or sets cell template. Default value is with binding .

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGridColumn.EditCellTemplate
member.summary: Gets or sets edit cell template. Default value is with binding .

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGridColumn.LineBreakMode
member.summary: Gets or sets for the text. Default value is .

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGridColumn.HorizontalContentAlignment
member.summary: Gets or sets horizontal alignment of the cell content.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGridColumn.VerticalContentAlignment
member.summary: Gets or sets vertical alignment of the cell content.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGridColumn.Padding
member.summary: Gets or sets the distance between an element and its child elements.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGridColumn.SortingEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the column is sortable. Default is true. But the DataGrid must also have sorting enabled. Sortable columns must implement .

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGridColumn.FilteringEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the column can be filtered. Default is true. But the DataGrid must also have filtering enabled.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGridColumn.HeaderLabelStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets label style of the header. must be Label.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataGridColumn.HeaderFilterStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets label style of the header. must be Label.

member.name: M:MauiControls.DataGridColumn.IsSortable
member.summary: Determines via reflection if the column's data type is sortable. If you want to disable sorting for specific column please use property.
member.returns: Boolean value representing whether the column is sortable.

member.name: F:MauiControls.DataGridRow.CellBackgroundColorProperty
member.summary: Gets or sets the background color of the cells within this DataGridRow.

member.name: F:MauiControls.DataGridRow.CellTextColorProperty
member.summary: Gets or sets the text color of the cells within this DataGridRow.

member.name: T:MauiControls.DataSorting.SortData
member.summary: Creates SortData for .
member.param: The index of the column to sort on.

member.name: M:MauiControls.DataSorting.SortData.#ctor(System.Int32,MauiControls.DataSorting.SortDirection)
member.summary: Creates SortData for .
member.param: The index of the column to sort on.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataSorting.SortData.Order
member.summary: Gets or sets sorting order for the column.

member.name: P:MauiControls.DataSorting.SortData.Index
member.summary: Gets or sets column Index to sort.

member.name: M:MauiControls.DataSorting.SortData.op_Implicit(System.Int32)~MauiControls.DataSorting.SortData
member.summary: Implicitly converts an integer to a SortData object.

member.name: M:MauiControls.DataSorting.SortData.FromInt32(System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a SortData object from an integer index. Negative indicies mean a descending sort.

member.name: T:MauiControls.IColorProvider
member.summary: Color Provider interface for Background and Text color of each row.

member.name: M:MauiControls.IColorProvider.GetColor(System.Int32,System.Object)
member.summary: Determines the Color for the row.
member.param: Index of the row based on DataSource.

member.name: T:MauiControls.Resource
member.summary: Android Resource Designer class. Exposes the Android Resource designer assembly into the project Namespace.
